rationale: Farmers need approachability, trust, and growth-oriented visuals. Light theme with vibrant greens (--green-mid, --green-muted) builds on the organic connection. We avoid dark tech-bro vibes in favor of sunlit, tactile interfaces (Clay & Crisp surfaces).

rules.h1: text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-black tracking-tight leading-none text-gray-900

layout.grid_strategy: Asymmetrical Bento grids for features. Split two-column layout for the app interface.
layout.radius: rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-full for buttons/chips
layout.borders: 1px solid var(--green-light) for soft structural definition

surfaces.header: Crystal Glass: bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-green-light/50
surfaces.cards: Clay & Crisp: bg-white shadow-[0_8px_30px_rgb(0,0,0,0.04)] border border-green-pale
surfaces.upload_zone: Dashed border (border-2 border-dashed border-green-muted/30) with subtle green-pale background, hover state deepens background and green-mid border

buttons.primary: bg-green-mid hover:bg-green-dark text-white rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-bold transition-all duration-300 shadow-lg shadow-green-mid/20 hover:shadow-green-mid/40 transform hover:-translate-y-0.5
buttons.secondary: bg-white border-2 border-green-mid text-green-mid hover:bg-green-pale rounded-full px-8 py-3 font-bold transition-all duration-300
buttons.outline: border border-green-light text-gray-900 hover:bg-green-pale hover:border-green-mid px-4 py-2 rounded-full font-semibold

components.crop_chips: border border-gray-200 text-gray-600 hover:border-green-mid hover:text-green-mid rounded-full px-4 py-2 text-sm font-bold transition-colors cursor-pointer data-[state=active]:bg-green-mid data-[state=active]:text-white data-[state=active]:border-green-mid
components.progress_steps: Horizontal layout with animated fill bar. Active step uses green-mid, inactive uses green-pale.

hero_bg.description: Green wheat field during sunset, used for Hero section visual impact

pipeline_visual.description: Close up green leaf for the AI scanning pipeline step

how_it_works.description: Smart farming tablet used for the feature/how it works visual

animation.strategy: Smooth, deliberate. Use framer-motion for staggering list items and fade-ups on the landing page.
animation.pipeline: Use glowing 'Tracing Beam' or subtle pulsing borders connecting the nodes in the pipeline section.

testing.rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., data-testid='upload-zone').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use plain JavaScript (.jsx). Do not use TypeScript.
Follow the React Router DOM setup strictly for '/' and '/app'.
Add the specified CSS variables directly to index.css.
Ensure 'Nunito' is imported from Google Fonts in index.css.

The Hero section must have high impact—consider using the hero_bg image with a soft gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-r from-black/60 via-black/30 to-transparent) if text is layered, or use a Bento grid layout to place the image beside the text.
Implement a fully functional UI state flow in AppPage (Empty -> Loading/Progress -> Results).
Ensure components are responsive, breaking down into single columns on mobile devices.
Add lucide-react icons for visual hierarchy (e.g., UploadCloud, Leaf, ShieldAlert).
